scenario: presentationFor('website') — `website` has NO TYPE_PRESENTATION entry, so it renders via the generic fallback. Mirrors renderer/all-types.json's byRelPath shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
specSource: docs/design/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §2 / §3.4 (unknown type ⇒ generic renderer + `akm show <ref>`); src/core/type-presentation.ts (KNOWN_TYPES does NOT include 'website'); src/core/recognition-util.ts.
realWorldSource: src/sources/website-ingest.ts — snapshot pages; the `website` type value the adapter emits
notes: SPECIFICATION golden. `website` is NOT in KNOWN_TYPES (the added 15th type was `instruction`, not `website`). presentationFor('website') therefore returns DEFAULT_PRESENTATION = {label:'Asset'}, renderer=null, generic action `akm show <ref>` (spec §3.4). Third-party/foreign types are never dropped — they stay searchable and render generically.

RESOLVED (open question 4, maintainer resolution 2026-07): `website` gets NO dedicated presentation entry — the generic fallback is CONFIRMED (in contrast to `instruction`, which DID get its own entry under open question 1). Website snapshot pages render generically. No longer open.
